headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Axon Enterprise (AXON) After Its Recent Share Price Rebound?
summary: This article examines whether Axon Enterprise is fairly priced at its recent level or starting to look stretched, by exploring what the current share price might be implying about the company’s value. The stock closed at US$496.27, with returns of 0.0% over the last 7 days, 15.4% over 30 days, and an 11.9% decline year to date, alongside an 11.4% decline over 1 year but very large gains over 3 and 5 years. Recent headlines have largely focused on Axon’s role as a provider of public safety...
